message:
fix: eliminate silent error fallbacks in storage and sync

- PRAGMA user_version: propagate errors instead of unwrap_or(0)
- parse_datetime: return Result instead of silently falling back to Utc::now()
  which could corrupt timestamps on malformed data
- import_from_jsonl: pre-fetch existing IDs into HashSet instead of
  calling id_exists().unwrap_or(false) per candidate in closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
